results.title: Nigeria, Ghana to deepen partnership against afrophobic protests
results.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria and the Government of Ghana have agreed to deepen their partnership against all forms of xenophobia, Afrophobia, intolerance and violence against fellow Africans. The two countries also emphasized that acts of violence against fellow Africans are contrary to the shared values of Pan-Africanism and the collective progress of the continent. results.title: NH judge: Concord man violated Civil Rights Act in assault on transgender woman
results.description: Local News The ruling stems from a 2024 assault at a Concord, New Hampshire, convenience store. A New Hampshire court has ruled that a Concord man violated the state’s Civil Rights Act after assaulting a transgender woman at her workplace in a bias-motivated attack, the New Hampshire Attorney General’s Office announced Thursday. results.title: Cricket world mourns death of West Indies great Garry Sobers
results.description: Sobers made his Test debut for the West Indies in 1954 after playing just two first-class matches. He represented the Caribbean side for 20 years and captained the team for seven years, leaving behind one of the most celebrated legacies in world cricket.
